title: Classic Canadian Poutine
description: A classic Canadian dish consisting of French fries topped with cheese curds and gravy. This recipe is a simplified version of the original.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add 1 cup of all-purpose flour and whisk together to make a roux, cooking for 1 minute.
Slowly add 1 cup of milk, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, stirring occasionally.
Add 1 cup of grated cheddar cheese and stir until melted.
Cook French fries according to package instructions.
In a large serving dish, place a portion of French fries.
Top with cheese curds and spoon the buttery gravy over the top.
